creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Version 2.11.07 has been released.


diff -urN /usr/ports/textproc/idnits/Makefile textproc/idnits/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/textproc/idnits/Makefile	2009-02-21 02:54:48.000000000 +0900
+++ textproc/idnits/Makefile	2009-03-14 21:31:15.000000000 +0900
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/textproc/idnits/Makefile,v 1.19 2009/02/20 16:35:53 miwi Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	idnits
-PORTVERSION=	2.11.03
+PORTVERSION=	2.11.07
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://tools.ietf.org/tools/idnits/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
diff -urN /usr/ports/textproc/idnits/distinfo textproc/idnits/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/textproc/idnits/distinfo	2009-02-21 02:54:48.000000000 +0900
+++ textproc/idnits/distinfo	2009-03-14 21:33:57.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (idnits-2.11.03.tgz) = fd733e93074152d5b90896261e94fe81
-SHA256 (idnits-2.11.03.tgz) = a2631f308cc8927a3beac2059e3ee8fca2b6fc2ae2efbd5072001820a3e32a00
-SIZE (idnits-2.11.03.tgz) = 47343
+MD5 (idnits-2.11.07.tgz) = d9f233e808e2cf033d79c57f5605756a
+SHA256 (idnits-2.11.07.tgz) = 904aa668820ae61fa8be3dac89cfcced0808d7e5de29236e838d80f877a94d4a
+SIZE (idnits-2.11.07.tgz) = 47996
